auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Genderize API key passed with the apikey query parameter. Sign up for a free key at https://genderize.io/register and manage it from https://genderize.io/store.

actions.name: predict_gender
actions.description: Predict the gender probability for a single name, optionally localized to one country.

name.description: The first name or full name string to classify with Genderize.

country_id.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to localize the prediction.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for predicting the gender of a single name.

name.description: The input name echoed back by Genderize.

anyOf.description: The inferred gender, or null when Genderize has no data for the name.

probability.description: The probability score returned by Genderize for the inferred gender.

count.description: The number of data rows Genderize used for the prediction.

country_id.description: The country code echoed by Genderize when the request was localized.

outputSchema.description: A single gender prediction returned by Genderize.

actions.name: predict_gender_batch
actions.description: Predict the gender probability for up to 10 names in a single request, optionally localized to one country.

items.description: The first name or full name string to classify with Genderize.

names.description: Up to 10 names to classify in one Genderize batch request.

country_id.description: The optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used to localize the prediction.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for predicting the gender of up to 10 names.

name.description: The input name echoed back by Genderize.

anyOf.description: The inferred gender, or null when Genderize has no data for the name.

probability.description: The probability score returned by Genderize for the inferred gender.

count.description: The number of data rows Genderize used for the prediction.

country_id.description: The country code echoed by Genderize when the request was localized.

items.description: A single gender prediction returned by Genderize.

predictions.description: The ordered list of gender predictions returned for the requested names.

outputSchema.description: The batch prediction result returned by Genderize.
